use_cases: Decorative background element for hero sections and landing pages
Visual loading indicator or ambient motion effect
Overlay backdrop decoration for cards and modal containers
Aesthetic accent for dark-themed interface sections
Background motion element for empty states
ai_summary: A decorative concentric ripple animation component featuring glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur and gradient-filled semi-transparent circles. Renders five layered circular borders that pulse with staggered infinite animations, supporting both light and dark modes. Best used as a background accent or visual placeholder for loading states in SaaS and landing page contexts.
